name: wf0a - 期初主数据灌库(一次性)

parameters.query: SELECT ItemCode, ItemName, InvntryUom, ManBtchNum FROM OITM WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE ItmsGrpCod NOT IN ('110','111','112','113') AND frozenFor = 'N' ORDER BY ItemCode

parameters.jsCode:
const total = $input.all().reduce((s,r)=> s + (r.json.count||0), 0);
return { json: { items_count: total } };

parameters.query: SELECT WhsCode, WhsName FROM OWHS WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE Inactive = 'N' ORDER BY WhsCode

SELECT B.BinCode AS bin_code, B.WhsCode AS whs_code, W.WhsName AS whs_name, ISNULL(B.Descr, '') AS bin_name, ISNULL(B.maxLevel, 0) AS max_level FROM OBIN B WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN OWHS W WITH (NOLOCK) ON B.WhsCode = W.WhsCode WHERE B.Disabled = 'N' AND W.Inactive = 'N' ORDER BY B.WhsCode, B.BinCode
